description_long: This sconce features a tall, slender pedestal base that supports a bowl-shaped light fixture with an open, geometric lattice design. The lattice is composed of interlocking hexagonal and pentagonal shapes, creating a visually striking pattern that encircles the light source. The bowl appears to cradle a single bulb, which is partially visible through the openwork metal. The base splits into four angled legs, providing stability and a slightly industrial aesthetic. The entire fixture is finished in a matte black or dark metallic color, giving it a modern yet slightly vintage feel. The design is both functional and decorative, making it suitable for urban outdoor or indoor environments.
description: A tall, black sconce with a geometric lattice bowl and four-legged base, featuring a single visible bulb. The design blends modern and industrial styles with decorative openwork.
description_view_0: The sconce is seen from a slight angle, highlighting the geometric lattice bowl and the four-legged base, with the bulb partially visible inside.
description_view_1: A direct front view shows the symmetry of the lattice bowl and the central alignment of the pedestal and legs.
description_view_2: This side view emphasizes the depth of the bowl and the angular spread of the legs, with the bulb still visible through the lattice.
description_view_3: The rear view displays the back of the lattice bowl and the full spread of the four legs, with less visibility of the bulb.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has an industrial and modern design, featuring a geometric openwork lattice bowl and a sturdy, angular four-legged base. The matte black finish and clean lines give it a contemporary yet slightly vintage appeal.
